name: Spectral Brand Theory
description: Brand identity specification encoded as an executable function. There is no logo. The function IS the identity.

parameters.signals: Array of data points, each carrying a spectral profile of 8 dimensional intensities
parameters.observer_position: Camera azimuth, elevation, distance — the viewing angle
parameters.time: Animation frame (0 for static renderings, continuous for website)

palette.constraint: 8 spectral colors + black + white only. No gradients that violate spectral ordering. No decorative elements that do not map to a theory concept.

spectral_profile.description: Each particle carries 8 intensity values (0-1). Apparent color = additive blend of 8 spectral colors x intensities. Zero-intensity dimensions produce dark gaps (structural absence).

field.description: Composite-colored particles drift — raw signal environment

rotation.description: Camera orbits — same data, different observer position

decomposition.description: Zoom in, each dot reveals its 8 spectral lines

identity.mark: The Eight Lines — 8 vertical bars in spectral order (violet to red) on black
identity.principle: The particle system function IS the identity. Every visual output is a rendering of the same function with different parameters.
identity.reflexive_proof: A framework that claims perception depends on observer position uses a visual identity that literally changes with observer position.
